title: Dropdown into single item

posts.author: Julia_trb_2024 (Julia Tremblay-Boily)
posts.cookedHtml: When multiple dropdowns are selected (as a task to do to catch up with a lead (lead board)), in the to do’s board (connected with the lead board), each of the selected dropdown would have their own item (not be in the same item as shown in the loom Automation Task Management 🤖 | Loom)
